description: Recto: Legal document referring to raw sugar, involving Yefet and Manṣūr. Signed by [Avraham] b. Shemaʿya. Verso: Document in Judaeo-Arabic in a different hand referring to referring to textiles (silk, wool and prices. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
